3087900.name: Heritage - A Dragon's Tale
3087900.description:
Embark on a grand quest as Flame, an anthropomorphic dragon, as he leaves his home in the sky for the dangerous world below to find and rescue his girlfriend Crystal from the nefarious General Mechos in this modernized love-letter to classic action-adventure games from the NES and SNES!

Jam-packed full of content, this game features 17 challenging levels, a total of 16 weapons (a mixture of spells and physical weapons), optional sidquests with varying rewards, a vast overworld between levels to explore, an experience and level-up system, and more! Defeat demons, conquer General Mechos' army, and discover your destiny in Heritage - A Dragon's Tale.
3087900.supported_languages: 英语, 法语, 德语, 西班牙语 - 西班牙, 俄语, 斯洛伐克语, 葡萄牙语 - 巴西
